data.name: Alchemy Quest
data.detailed_description:
Alchemy Quest is the story of a young sorceress that’s ended up in a sticky situation. Now she has to rely on her pretty looks and alchemical knowledge to get out of it. Even though she faces many daunting challenges ahead of her, she has a trick up her sleeve; by drinking the semen of other people and monsters she’s able to steal their powers.

The game features classic RPG-content with enemies and dungeons, tons of animated sex scenes, mini-games, alchemy, outfits and gardening.  

The game contains 100s of unique items and outfits to try. Tons of special spells and sexual skills that allows you to create your own playstyle, as well as many types of enemies that require strategy or preparation to defeat.

The game contains a huge amount of lewd content that gets progressively unlocked throughout the game, including images, animations and mini-games.

Between all of the salacious fucking and the fierce battles the game contains a variety of side-activities. You can collect cute outfits, grow plants in the garden, brew new potions in the lab, or gamble away your hard-earned coins playing cards. 

Whether you play as a total whore that fucks everything that moves or as tactical alchemist; Alchemy Quest has a lot of content to offer.

data.short_description: After being expelled from the academy Jericho is forced to use sex and alchemy to survive many wild and passionate adventures in an unforgiving realm.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: windows 7
  • 處理器: x86, x64 architecture with SSE2 instruction set support.
  • 記憶體: 800 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DX10, DX11, and DX12-capable GPUs
  • 儲存空間: 1700 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: ?
  • VR 支援: nope
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: windows 10
  • 處理器: x86, x64 architecture with SSE2 instruction set support.
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DX10, DX11, and DX12-capable GPUs
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: ?
  • VR 支援: nope
